narrative: Senior Data Scientist with six years’ experience at Mad Street Den, a product‑focused AI startup. Their background in vector databases (Milvus, pgvector) and retrieval frameworks (Weaviate, Haystack) directly supports the Search & Retrieval focus of the role, and experience with LoRA shows familiarity with modern model‑fine‑tuning techniques.
